projects.title: Sales Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive Power BI dashboard built to monitor sales performance, shipments, profitability, and year-over-year trends. The report uses Power Query, DAX, and a relational data model to deliver executive KPI reporting with dynamic filtering and time intelligence.
projects.imageAlt: Sales Analytics Dashboard overview showing sales KPIs, shipment trends, goals, and gross margin

projects.title: Manufacturing Scheduler Tools
projects.description: A Streamlit application built to support manufacturing scheduling through machine rule management, scheduler validation, deployment review, and support utilities.

images.alt: Machine Rules Editor used to manage manufacturing scheduling rules
images.label: Machine Rules

images.alt: Scheduler Change Log used to review and validate scheduling changes
images.label: Change Log

projects.title: Customer Priority Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive Power BI dashboard designed to help manufacturing teams prioritize customer demand by combining inventory availability, purchase orders, and open sales orders into a single operational reporting solution.
projects.imageAlt: Customer Priority Dashboard showing customer priorities, inventory availability, purchase orders, and operational KPIs
